name: Mock Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 8
Combine the first seven ingredients and shape into patties.
Set aside. To make sauce, sauté onion slices in 3 tablespoons butter or margarine until soft. Add remaining ingredients for sauce. Place patties in a large baking pan in a single layer and pour sauce over. Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake at 375°F for one hour. After baking, remove the foil, sprinkle each patty generously with the Mozzarella cheese, and return to oven until cheese is melted.
